tasks.title: Configure Avalara API Credentials
tasks.description: In Business Manager, go to Merchant Tools > Site Preferences > Custom Preferences > Avalara AvaTax. Enter your Account ID, License Key, and Company Code.

tasks.title: Select Avalara Environment
tasks.description: Set the Environment to 'Sandbox' for testing or 'Production' for live transactions.

tasks.title: Enable Avalara Tax
tasks.description: Toggle 'Enable Avalara Tax' to true to activate the integration.

tasks.title: Verify Cartridge Path
tasks.description: Ensure 'int_avalara_tax' is included in the cartridge path for your site (Business Manager > Administration > Sites > Manage Sites > [site] > Settings).

tasks.title: Test Tax Calculation
tasks.description: Add a product to the cart, proceed to checkout, enter a shipping address, and verify that tax is calculated correctly.
